2605.22723.title: The Value of Covariance Matching in Gaussian DDPMs and the Lanczos Sampler
2605.22723.paper_summary: A central error measure in Gaussian DDPMs is the path-space KL divergence between the exact reverse chain and the learned Gaussian reverse process. This quantity is especially relevant for procedures such as classifier guidance, which perturb the entire reverse trajectory rather than only the terminal sample. Prior analyses show that standard isotropic reverse covariances suffer an unavoidable $Ω(1/T)$ path-KL error as the number of denoising steps $T$ grows. We show that matching the full posterior covariance breaks this barrier, yielding an order-wise improvement that reduces the path KL to $O(1/T^2)$. To make full covariance matching practical, we introduce the Lanczos Gaussian sampler (LGS), a training-free, matrix-free method for sampling from the optimal reverse covariance using only covariance-vector products, which are available through Jacobian-vector products of the posterior mean. LGS avoids dense covariance storage and auxiliary covariance models. We prove that LGS approximation error decays exponentially in the number of Lanczos steps, where each Lanczos step requires a single Jacobian-vector product. Empirically, using only just three such steps improves sample quality over strong diagonal-covariance baselines, including OCM-DDPM, across standard image benchmarks. This identifies full covariance matching as both theoretically valuable and practically accessible for fast DDPM sampling.
2605.22723.paper_summary_zh: 一個在高斯DDPM中的核心誤差度量是精確反向鏈與學習到的高斯反向過程之間的路徑空間KL散度。<lb/>這個量對於像分類器引導這樣的程序特別相關，因為這些程序會擾動整個反向軌跡，而不僅僅是終端樣本。<lb/>先前的分析顯示，標準的各向同性反向協方差隨著去噪步驟數$T$的增加，會遭受不可避免的$Ω(1/T)$路徑-KL誤差。<lb/>我們顯示，匹配完整的後驗協方差打破了這一障礙，帶來了逐次改進，將路徑KL降低到$O(1/T^2)$。<lb/>為了使完整協方差匹配變得實用，我們引入了Lanczos高斯取樣器（LGS），這是一種無需訓練、無需矩陣的方法，僅使用協方差-向量乘積從最佳反向協方差中取樣，這些乘積可以通過後驗均值的雅可比-向量乘積獲得。<lb/>LGS避免了密集的協方差存儲和輔助協方差模型。<lb/>我們證明，LGS的近似誤差隨著Lanczos步驟數的增加而指數衰減，每個Lanczos步驟需要一個雅可比-向量乘積。<lb/>在實證上，僅使用三個這樣的步驟就能改善樣本質量，超越強大的對角協方差基準，包括OCM-DDPM，在標準圖像基準測試中。<lb/>這表明完整協方差匹配在理論上是有價值的，並且在快速DDPM取樣中是實際可及的。
2605.22723.author: Md Sahil Akhtar et.al.
2605.22723.authors: Md Sahil Akhtar, Aymane El Gadarri, Vivek F. Farias, Adam D. Jozefiak
